subject: A merfolk wizard standing at the prow of a ship or stone outcropping, arms raised as a towering wall of water surges up behind them
description: A blue-skinned merfolk wizard with long flowing hair and trailing finlike adornments stands with arms outstretched, conjuring or commanding a massive cresting wave that towers behind them. The figure wears layered robes and ornate bracers in the Greek-inspired Theros style, suggestive of a priest-mage of the sea. The composition is dominated by deep ocean blues and white foam, with the wave's crest curling overhead like architecture. The horizon below shows distant low cliffs or islands. Light catches the wet surfaces and the figure's skin in cool highlights, giving the whole scene an aquatic luminescence.
foreground: merfolk wizard with raised arms casting a spell
background: towering cresting ocean wave under an open sky
